name: Leg of Veal with Anchivies
recipeInstructions:
1. Make shallow incisions all over the surface of the veal using a sharp knife.
2. Stuff each incision with a small amount of minced garlic and an anchovy fillet.
3. Insert 4-6 cloves into the meat as well.
4. Place the leg of veal in an oven-safe casserole or Pyrex chicken roaster.
5. Sprinkle pepper over the surface of the meat.
6. Surround the veal with onion slices.
7. Add two bay leaves to the dish.
8. Pour white wine over the veal, ensuring it covers the bottom of the dish.
9. Cover the casserole and roast in a 160°C oven for 2-3 hours.
10. Serve hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
